entry.title: Re: Installing Composable Storefront for SAP Commerce 2211.20
entry.content:
Hello Amit,

I'm sorry you're having difficulty with this command. It is possible that the version you're trying to load (the 'latest' version) is not compatible with the version of Angular or node.js you are using. I suggest you try installing the exact version in this guide. If that works, then consult the documentation to find out what the required versions of Angular and node.js are required for the latest version, then try again with that version. 

I hope that helps.

entry.title: Re: Request for Guidance on Transferring Assets to New Co...
entry.content:
Hi,

The merge or split of company codes is always considered to be a project which needs to be planned and executed in very diligent way. Depending on the country of the affected company codes you need to consider legal aspects. It is advisable to get in touch with a consulting team to get it done in the right way. The tool we offer for that purpose are the asset transfer or the asset legacy take-over.

Good luck!

entry.title: Re: How to post parked invoices via BAPI process?
entry.content:
Your requirement can be met in two steps:

  • BAPI_INCOMINGINVOICE_CHANGE - to edit parked invoice data
  • BAPI_INCOMINGINVOICE_POST - to post parked invoice

entry.title: Re: Custom CDS Views - Using Multiple Data Sources
entry.content:
Hello Andreas,

This is a really great blog! It helped me already a lot but now I’m struggling with one topic:

C_MaintOrdConfirmationDEX provides a list of order confirmations. One order can have several confirmations. From C_MaintOrdConfirmationDEX I want to build a view which summarizes per order the confirmed number of hours. This view shall be later used in an analytical query.

Sample data for C_MaintOrdConfirmationDEX (confirmation ID = key):
Confirmation1    Order1     5 hours
Confirmation2    Order1     2 hours
Confirmation3    Order2     9 hours

Desired result in target CDS view:
Order1    7 hours
Order2    9 hours

How can I reach this or something similar in F1866A?

Txs,
Mischa

entry.title: How to access application with app/router
entry.content:
I have build 2 UI5 apps. one with app/router and one without app/router folder configuration.

I deployed both the apps, but I am unable to access application with app/router. Is there any extra config changes I need to do apps with app/router in mta.yaml?

 

Staging application "SourcingTool"...
Application "SourcingTool-db-deployer" staged
Application "SourcingTool-srv" staged
Executing task "deploy" on application "SourcingTool-db-deployer"...
Starting application "SourcingTool-srv"...
Application "SourcingTool" staged
Application "SourcingTool-srv" started and available at "******-hello-gcp-2ew6xm6d-gcp-dev-sourcingtool-srv.cfapps.us30.hana.ondemand.com"
Starting application "SourcingTool"...
Application "SourcingTool" started and available at "*****-hello-gcp-2ew6xm6d-gcp-dev-sourcingtool.cfapps.us30.hana.ondemand.com"
Skipping deletion of services, because the command line option "--delete-services" is not specified.
Process finished.
Use "cf dmol -i ca78d1e5-76ad-11ef-8765-eeee0a8b050c" to download the logs of the process.

 

 

here is my mta.yaml.

 

 

_schema-version: 3.3.0
ID: SourcingTool
description: A simple CAP project.
version: 1.0.0
modules:
- name: SourcingTool-srv
  type: nodejs
  path: gen/srv
  requires:
  - name: SourcingTool-db
  - name: SourcingTool-uaa
  provides:
  - name: srv-api
    properties:
      srv-url: ${default-url}
  parameters:
    buildpack: nodejs_buildpack
    readiness-health-check-http-endpoint: /health
    readiness-health-check-type: http
  build-parameters:
    builder: npm
- name: SourcingTool-db-deployer
  type: hdb
  path: gen/db
  requires:
  - name: SourcingTool-db
  parameters:
    buildpack: nodejs_buildpack
- name: SourcingTool
  type: approuter.nodejs
  path: app/router
  requires:
  - name: srv-api
    group: destinations
    properties:
      forwardAuthToken: true
      name: srv-api
      url: ~{srv-url}
  - name: SourcingTool-uaa
  - name: SourcingTool-destination
    group: destinations
    properties:
      forwardAuthToken: false
      name: ui5
      url: https://ui5.sap.com
  parameters:
    disk-quota: 1024M
    keep-existing-routes: true
    memory: 512M
- name: SourcingTool-destinations
  type: com.sap.application.content
  requires:
  - name: SourcingTool-uaa
    parameters:
      service-key:
        name: SourcingTool-uaa-key
  - name: SourcingTool-html5-repo-host
    parameters:
      service-key:
        name: SourcingTool-html5-repo-host-key
  - name: srv-api
  - name: SourcingTool-destination
    parameters:
      content-target: true
  parameters:
    content:
      instance:
        destinations:
        - Authentication: OAuth2UserTokenExchange
          Name: SourcingTool-app-srv
          TokenServiceInstanceName: SourcingTool-uaa
          TokenServiceKeyName: SourcingTool-uaa-key
          URL: ~{srv-api/srv-url}
          sap.cloud.service: SourcingTool.service
        - Name: SourcingTool-html5-repo-host
          ServiceInstanceName: SourcingTool-html5-repo-host
          ServiceKeyName: SourcingTool-html5-repo-host-key
          sap.cloud.service: SourcingTool.service
        - Authentication: OAuth2UserTokenExchange
          Name: SourcingTool-uaa
          ServiceInstanceName: SourcingTool-uaa
          ServiceKeyName: SourcingTool-uaa-key
          sap.cloud.service: SourcingTool.service
        existing_destinations_policy: update
  build-parameters:
    no-source: true
- name: SourcingTool-app-content
  type: com.sap.application.content
  path: .
  requires:
  - name: SourcingTool-html5-repo-host
    parameters:
      content-target: true
  build-parameters:
    build-result: resources
    requires:
    - artifacts:
      - comsourcingtoolsourcingtool.zip
      name: comsourcingtoolsourcingtool
      target-path: resources/
- name: comsourcingtoolsourcingtool
  type: html5
  path: app/sourcingtool
  build-parameters:
    build-result: dist
    builder: custom
    commands:
    - npm install
    - npm run build:cf
    supported-platforms: []
resources:
- name: SourcingTool-db
  type: com.sap.xs.hdi-container
  parameters:
    service: hana
    service-plan: hdi-shared
- name: SourcingTool-uaa
  type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service
  parameters:
    config:
      role-collections:
      - description: ToolsAdmin
        name: ToolsAdmin
        role-template-references:
        - $XSAPPNAME.ToolsAdmin
      tenant-mode: dedicated
      xsappname: SourcingTool-${org}-${space}
    path: ./xs-security.json
    service: xsuaa
    service-plan: application
- name: SourcingTool-destination
  type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service
  parameters:
    config:
      HTML5Runtime_enabled: true
      init_data:
        instance:
          destinations:
          - Authentication: NoAuthentication
            Name: ui5
            ProxyType: Internet
            Type: HTTP
            URL: https://ui5.sap.com
          existing_destinations_policy: update
    service: destination
    service-plan: lite
- name: SourcingTool-html5-repo-host
  type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service
  parameters:
    service: html5-apps-repo
    service-plan: app-host
parameters:
  deploy_mode: html5-repo
  enable-parallel-deployments: true
build-parameters:
  before-all:
  - builder: custom
    commands:
    - npm ci
    - npx cds build --production

entry.title: Re: SAP TM Performance - Analyzing the Issue
entry.content:
Even after 7 years, this is a relevant topic for our Organization.  We struggle with this, at every site.  Also, to add to the struggle is having a User open the Items tab on a Freight Order with 30 materials... pure frustration.  We have tried removing Fields from the Transportation Cockpit and removing quadrants. 

Users insist on having a longer planning horizon.  To combat this, we have employed Data Crawlers to remove PGI'd and PGR'd Freight Orders and accompanied Freight Units.  That is only moderately successful.

entry.title: Re: “I now have SAP S/4HANA Embedded Analytics. Do I still need a data warehouse?”
entry.content:
You cannot replace tools like Qlik,etc. with something based on HANA and Fiori UI.
This is only the „Embedded Analytics“-functionality and not the „SAP Analytics Cloud“ !

If you are new to SAP, you can do the first steps with EA,
but if you are thinking about data with additional logic, proper reporting functionality and meaningful dashboards, you cannot do this with EA.

entry.title: Embedding Generative AI into SAP S/4HANA: A Holistic Approach to Intelligent Business Operations
entry.content:
In the fast-paced world of enterprise technology, Generative AI is making waves by offering capabilities far beyond traditional AI. In SAP S/4HANA, this evolution is driving a new era of transactional intelligence where AI not only generates text or automates workflows but actively engages with real-time data and enterprise processes to enhance business operations.

In this post, we’ll explore how Generative AI is embedded into SAP S/4HANA, transforming how businesses interact with their core systems, from automating content creation to making informed transactional decisions. This is based on the latest advancements highlighted by SAP’s own Generative AI solution concepts and expanding use cases​.

Generative AI: Moving from Content to Transactions

Generative AI traditionally started as a tool for text generation, handling tasks like content creation, summarization, or code generation. However, in the context of SAP, Generative AI’s role has expanded dramatically.

We now see GenAI being applied to a wider range of processes:

  1. Text -> Code -> Workflow -> Transactional Data: Generative AI in SAP now supports generating not just textual outputs but handling workflows and interacting with transactional data. Whether it's automating invoice generation, managing inventory, or creating product orders, GenAI can handle the entire flow autonomously, offering solutions to business challenges as they arise​.
  2. Prompting Large Language Models (LLMs) for Enhanced Business Interaction:
    • LLM Retrieval via Fine-Tuning and RAG: Through Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), businesses can now send SAP data into LLMs via HANA vector databases to receive precise responses based on real-time transactional information. Imagine asking the system, "Can this sales order be fulfilled by the end of the month?" and getting a direct, data-backed response​.
    • Document Processing through OCR and LLMs: GenAI can take unstructured data, such as scanned PDFs, and transform it into structured formats like JSON, automating document management processes like invoice extraction or contract analysis​.

These advancements enable non-technical users to interact with SAP’s intelligent core using natural language prompts, making complex business operations more intuitive and efficient.

Expanding LLM Capabilities for SAP S/4HANA

One of the most exciting advancements is the ability to extend LLMs to act as intelligent agents within the SAP environment. LLMs are no longer passive tools but can now plan, execute, and optimize business processes autonomously.

Key innovations include:

  1. LLM-Driven SAP API Integration: Generative AI is integrated with SAP APIs, allowing LLMs to autonomously retrieve API data, plan business actions (such as initiating a production order), and even execute these actions without human intervention​.
    • Example: The LLM accesses the SAP API_CORE, retrieves available APIs, and autonomously configures business processes such as setting up an order, managing inventory, or scheduling deliveries. This level of intelligent automation reduces manual intervention and accelerates business decisions.
  2. Four-Tier LLM Structure for Enhanced Enterprise Automation:
    • General-purpose LLMs: Handle generic language and data tasks.
    • Domain-specific LLMs: Fine-tuned with SAP data, these models can understand complex enterprise data and processes.
    • Cross-task LLMs: Perform more specialized functions like job posting creation, purchase order generation, and workflow automation.
    • Task-specific LLMs: Fully customized for specific business tasks, such as generating API calls for unique operational needs​(Embedding Generative AI…).

This hierarchical model structure offers both broad and specialized AI capabilities, empowering businesses to customize their AI solutions for optimal performance. A detailed blog is available on LAM (Large Action Model) powered agents for enterprise process automation to execute a bunch of tasks.

Building SAP’s Own Generative AI Foundation Models

SAP is moving toward building its own Generative AI foundation models, specifically designed to handle the unique challenges of enterprise environments. These models are not just about handling text or data—they integrate business process context, industry-specific knowledge, and transactional intelligence.

SAP’s own foundation models are trained on structured data, such as financial transactions, sales orders, and manufacturing records, as well as tabular and graph-based data. This integration allows businesses to query real-time transactional data for more accurate, predictive decision-making.

For example:

  • Predictive Transactional Intelligence: Imagine asking the system, “Will this product shipment arrive on time based on current production schedules?” SAP’s GenAI model, trained on past transactional data and current operational insights, will deliver a reliable prediction​.

SAP’s approach focuses on integrating these foundation models with business process metadata, creating a knowledge graph that continuously improves AI accuracy and relevance in real-time business contexts.

Solution Architecture: Embedding Generative AI in SAP S/4HANA

SAP’s Generative AI solution architecture is built on a scalable and adaptable framework. The architecture leverages SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) to provide advanced capabilities in prompt engineering, embedding lookup, and model fine-tuning, all of which are key to customizing the AI to the needs of each enterprise.

Key components of the architecture include:

  1. Joule Integration: Joule is a natural language interface that helps users retrieve information or execute tasks through Conversational AI. The assistant interacts with the Generative AI models to provide real-time business insights​. A detailed blog will be available soon on Joule implementation.
  2. Advanced Prompting: For applications requiring complex prompt engineering, SAP’s BTP provides capabilities such as embedding domain-specific knowledge or leveraging vector search engines to improve the relevance of AI outputs. This ensures that the prompts provided to the LLMs are fine-tuned to yield the most accurate responses​.

Model Retraining for Custom Business Needs: SAP’s architecture supports model retraining using specific enterprise data. This allows businesses to continuously improve their AI models to match evolving operational requirements​.

Conclusion: Generative AI and the Future of SAP S/4HANA

The integration of Generative AI into SAP S/4HANA marks a turning point in the evolution of enterprise AI. With SAP building its own foundation models, capable of handling not just content but transactional and predictive business intelligence, the potential for businesses to automate, optimize, and innovate has never been greater.

From intelligent document processing to real-time decision-making and workflow automation, Generative AI is not only enhancing how enterprises operate but is paving the way for the future of the intelligent enterprise.

If you haven’t explored the potential of embedding Generative AI into your SAP environment, now is the time. Whether you're looking to automate processes, improve decision-making, or simply enhance user experiences, SAP S/4HANA is ready to help you unlock the full potential of this transformative technology.

entry.title: Re: Integration of Third Party (Non-SAP) systems with Central Finance
entry.content:
Hi Vinay,

This is a very good article.  I am currently working on a scenario where we have few non-SAP systems, one of them is PeopleSoft. Can we use Oracle SOA for data extraction, SLT for transforming data and moving to staging table and eventually replicating to CFIN? Which third party tool is cost effective and works better in this case? 

1. Non-SAP ERP-->Magnitude-->Data Services for transforming-->SLT-->CFIN

2. Non-SAP ERP-->Syniti-->SLT(transforming and replication-->CFIN

3. Non-SAP ERP-->SDI-->CFIN

4. Non-SAP ERP --> Data Sphere--> SLT--> CFIN

5. Non-SAP ERP --> Oracle SOA-->SLT for transformation and replication-->CFIN

Thank you

SSR

entry.title: Re: Unable to perform POST from SAP Build Apps.
entry.content:
As @miroll suggested, the blog contains the answer.

You just need to add the code below inside in your package.json

"cds": {
  "features":{
     "odata_new_adapter": false
  }
}

entry.title: O K X Referral Code: BET888 (Claim New User Bonus)
entry.content:
An O K X referral code, such as "BET888," is a special promotional code that offers new users various benefits when they open an O K X account. Think of it as a welcome gift for newcomers. By applying a referral code during registration, you can receive perks like sign-up bonuses, trading fee discounts, and surprise boxes with additional rewards. Additionally, you can explore more earning opportunities through the O K X reward hub, complete identity verification via KYC O K X, and take advantage of exclusive offers in the latest O K X campaign. All of this can be easily managed through the O K X App, where users can also explore the platform’s Earn section to generate passive income.

All of this can be easily managed through the O K X App, where users can also explore the platform’s Earn section to generate passive income.

entry.title: O K X Реферальний код: BET888 (Отримайте бонус для нового користувача)
entry.content:
Реферальний код O K X, наприклад «BET888», — це спеціальний промо-код, який пропонує новим користувачам різноманітні переваги, коли вони відкривають обліковий запис O K X. Сприймайте це як вітальний подарунок для новачків. Застосувавши реферальний код під час реєстрації, ви можете отримати такі переваги, як бонуси за реєстрацію, знижки на комісію за торгівлю та коробки-сюрпризи з додатковими винагородами. Крім того, ви можете досліджувати більше можливостей заробітку через центр винагород O K X, завершити перевірку особи через KYC O K X і скористатися ексклюзивними пропозиціями в останній кампанії O K X. Усім цим можна легко керувати через додаток O K X, де користувачі також можуть досліджувати розділ платформи «Заробити», щоб отримати пасивний дохід.

entry.title: O K X Empfehlungscode: BET888 (Bonus für neue Benutzer beanspruchen)
entry.content:
Ein O K X-Empfehlungscode wie „BET888“ ist ein spezieller Aktionscode, der neuen Benutzern verschiedene Vorteile bietet, wenn sie ein O K X-Konto eröffnen. Betrachten Sie ihn als Willkommensgeschenk für Neulinge. Wenn Sie bei der Registrierung einen Empfehlungscode eingeben, können Sie Vergünstigungen wie Anmeldeboni, Rabatte auf Handelsgebühren und Überraschungsboxen mit zusätzlichen Belohnungen erhalten. Darüber hinaus können Sie über das O K X-Belohnungszentrum weitere Verdienstmöglichkeiten erkunden, die Identitätsüberprüfung über KYC O K X abschließen und exklusive Angebote in der neuesten O K X-Kampagne nutzen. All dies kann einfach über die O K X-App verwaltet werden, wo Benutzer auch den Abschnitt „Verdienen“ der Plattform erkunden können, um passives Einkommen zu erzielen.

entry.title: Code de parrainage O K X : BET888 (réclamez le bonus pour les nouveaux utilisateurs)
entry.content:
Un code de parrainage O K X, tel que « BET888 », est un code promotionnel spécial qui offre aux nouveaux utilisateurs divers avantages lorsqu'ils ouvrent un compte O K X. Considérez-le comme un cadeau de bienvenue pour les nouveaux arrivants. En appliquant un code de parrainage lors de votre inscription, vous pouvez recevoir des avantages tels que des bonus d'inscription, des réductions sur les frais de négociation et des boîtes surprises avec des récompenses supplémentaires. De plus, vous pouvez explorer davantage d'opportunités de gain via le centre de récompenses O K X, effectuer une vérification d'identité via KYC O K X et profiter d'offres exclusives dans la dernière campagne O K X. Tout cela peut être facilement géré via l'application O K X, où les utilisateurs peuvent également explorer la section Gagner de la plateforme pour générer des revenus passifs.

entry.content:
how to open a connection from S4/HANA to oracle.

we are in the process to setup s4/HANA and we need to be able:

  1.  to connect from s4/HANA to another database (oracle on premise)
  2. We need to connect from on premise oracle database to s4/HANA

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: how to open a connection from S4/HANA to other database
entry.content:
Dear customer,

You can utilize SDA(Smart Data Access) feature provided by SAP HANA.
Please refer to the following information.

  • SDA feature can be used for this requirement.
    • 2180119 - FAQ: SAP HANA Smart Data Access
      2600176 - SAP HANA Smart Data Access Supported Remote Sources
    • SAP HANA Smart Data Access 

      • SAP HANA smart data access lets you access remote data as if the data were stored in local tables in SAP HANA, without copying the data into SAP HANA. 
        This capability lets you access and integrate data from multiple remote systems in real time.

        In SAP HANA, you use linked database or create virtual tables, which point to remote tables in different remote databases, and then write SQL queries in SAP HANA that use these virtual tables. 
        The SAP HANA query processor optimizes these queries by executing the relevant part of the query in the remote database, returning the results of the query to SAP HANA, and then completing the operation. 
        Physical data movement is not supported by SAP HANA smart data access.

        Because smart data access is part of the SAP HANA core system, no additional licensing is required to use it. 
        Additional support packages and patches are available for download from the SAP Software Download Center, and are installed using the SAP HANA database lifecyle manager (HDBLCM).

Regarding to the reverse connection(Oracle -> HANA), please open a support ticket to ORACLE support team.
Hope this helps.

Best regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: O K X 紹介コード: BET888 (新規ユーザー ボーナスの請求)
entry.content:
「BET888」などの O K X 紹介コードは、新規ユーザーが O K X アカウントを開設するとさまざまな特典が提供される特別なプロモーション コードです。新規ユーザーへのウェルカム ギフトと考えてください。登録時に紹介コードを適用すると、サインアップ ボーナス、取引手数料の割引、追加報酬の入ったサプライズ ボックスなどの特典を受け取ることができます。さらに、O K X 報酬ハブを通じてより多くの収益機会を探したり、KYC O K X による本人確認を完了したり、最新の O K X キャンペーンの限定オファーを利用したりすることができます。これらすべては、O K X アプリを通じて簡単に管理できます。ユーザーは、プラットフォームの獲得セクションを探索して受動的な収入を得ることもできます。

entry.title: Phemex Referral Code: HMXFT5 (How to get Phemex bonus?)
entry.content:
Getting started with the Phemex Referral Code is easy. Here's a step-by-step guide on how to proceed: Visit Phemex Website or App Go to https://phemex.com or install the Phemex app on your iOS or Android device. Make sure to download the app from trusted sources like the Google Play Store or Apple App Store to avoid scams or hacks. Create a Phemex Account If you're using the web interface, click on the "Register Now" button located at the top left. For mobile users, tap on the "Create an account" button. This will bring up a sign-up form where you'll need to enter your email and password. Enter the Phemex Referral Code On the sign-up form, select "Referral Code (Optional)" to reveal a new text field. Enter the Phemex Referral Code HMXFT5 into the text field. Click on "Create Account" to complete the sign-up process and receive your sign-up bonus of up to $8,800. By following these simple steps, you can easily access the benefits of the Phemex Referral Code and Phemex Earn, giving y

entry.title: How to use Account value to PREVIOUS function of Date in Data action
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have a requirement where the user wants to input the number of months for delay in payment.

Let’s say we have 3 GLs – Number_of_Month, Payment, Delayed_payment

Number_of_Month – User inputs number of months

Delayed_payment – Previous (Number_of_Month) of Payment

When I write the DA for this like below it is working for a single company code but when I have Number_of_Month for another company code then it sums up the Number_of_Month

 

INTEGER @A

@A = RESULTLOOKUP([d/GLACCOUNT] = " Number_of_Month, [d/Date] = "000000")

IF RESULTLOOKUP([d/GLACCOUNT] = """ Number_of_Month, [d/Date] = "000000"> 0 THEN

DATA([d/GLACCOUNT] = "Delayed_payment") = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Date] = PREVIOUS (@A, "MONTH"), [d/GLACCOUNT] = "Payment")

ENDIF

I run this for 202412 period

This works as expected when we have value for only one company code.

Delayed_payment

202412

-

 

But when I have months for another Company code it sums up (12+12=24 month) and shows the 202212th value for both Company codes

100

Delayed_payment

CC2

202412

111

 

I have tried using FOREACH and also VARIABLEMEMBER as well but no luck.

Is there any other way to achieve this.

Thanks in advance.

Vijay

entry.title: SAP BusinessAI – Overview for all !!!
entry.content:
SAP Business AI – Overview

While AI is taking over the market with its capabilities, every customer is keen on looking at the portfolio to improve the business and benefit from AI capabilities. SAP Business AI (Artificial Intelligence) is the suite of AI capabilities integrated into SAP's Enterprise Software Solutions. These AI functionalities are designed to help businesses automate processes, gain insights from data, improve decision-making, and enhance customer experiences.

Here's a high-level overview of what SAP Business AI encompasses:

SAP provides a unique approach to our customers for all the SAP Solutions, we have multiple AI Services options to choose from. With these options, you must have heard about our Relevant, Reliable, and Responsible approach to AI.

Most of the time, the common question that I hear is how do you offer these services and how can customers benefit from them?

As shown in the above image, we approach them mainly into 3 different buckets –

  • Embedded AI Capabilities
  • Joule
  • AI Services in SAP BTP

1. Embedded AI Capabilities:

As the name indicates, Embedded AI services are integrated directly into your enterprise applications which can be activated without the need of additional setup or new systems. You can benefit from the services instantly and use them for your business needs.

Here are some of the capabilities that you may be interested and you can find the SAP Business AI - Roadmap Explorer here.

I would like to call out SAP SuccessFactors Generative AI Services as one of the most used embedded services, you can find the availability and the data center support list here and I recommend checking the other Line of Business services based on your interest.

Next question, how do we get access to these AI services?

This can be accessed via a subscription option where you need to purchase SAP AI Units standalone or part of bundle packages. AI units can be considered as a virtual currency that can be used to consume any of the Business AI service capabilities and this will be metered against your consumption and charged accordingly. You can check the AI Services list here and you can find the Estimator Tool which can help you assess the required AI Units for your business context.

Once you purchase your required AI Units, it will be a pool of AI units that can be used by any premium AI services based on your system availability and activations. Each AI service comes with a metric that can be calculated using the Estimator Tool and your consumption will be visible on https://me.sap.com every month, and they are based on annual consumption based on the contract start date.

For more questions and support, I recommend reaching your SAP Account Executive or your Customer Success Partner to start your discussion.

2. Joule

Joule is our next-generation AI Copilot by SAP which can assist you with business-related questions and tasks. While Joule is integrated into your SAP services, it can interact with humans naturally in a contextual manner which brings multiple advantages for business users and helps to increase efficiency.  

Joule interactions are achieved using advanced algorithms and large language models (LLM) for user queries and user intents. If a user posts a question to Joule, the copilot understands the intent and with the help of the integration with your SAP Business Applications, it gives the appropriate response.

While Joule is evolving, we have expanded our scope to support user queries from SAP Business Applications, SAP Help portal, and Customer Documents e.g., Leave Policy, Company Policy, Vendor Policy, Travel Policy, Contract Policy, Reimbursement Policy, Global/Local Policy, etc...

2.1 Joule Capabilities

Joule Capabilities otherwise also called interaction patterns, we have carefully considered the most common scenarios in which a user can interact with Joule and categorize into different patterns. Each of these patterns is offered with products based on the release dates and product roadmaps. Today we support 3 different patterns, mainly

  • The transactional pattern provides our users a direct entry point to SAP the backend system. Triggering and influencing business processes with the power of natural language and generative AI. E.g. purchase orders which need to be reviewed and approved, job positions which are created, OR any other CRUD (Create, Read, Update, Delete) based interactions. All our Cloud products are currently developing such content packages for Joule for the most relevant user interactions.
  • The navigational pattern helps our users handle business processes themselves in the relevant SAP screen. Joule allows users to navigate directly where they want to go. This is especially helpful for users who are not very familiar with navigating SAP applications.
  • The informational pattern we are providing our users knowledge-based results. These are for example policy related questions. We differ between two categories of informational Joule questions:
    • One is based on SAP-owned content to have all our knowledge base available via Joule, e.g. with the SAP-help documentation. This is managed by SAP and offered to every Joule user out of the box.
    • Additionally, we are enabling customers to upload customer-owned content. This allows customers to upload their HR policies, travel policies, information content, and others. We call this functionality Document Grounding.

We are also working the 4th the pattern

  • Analytical pattern, we plan to introduce analytical interactions. Coming later in 2024 we plan to enable analytical interactions based on JustAsk and SAP Analytics Cloud, enabling customers to leverage Joule for analytical queries. In 2025, we plan to integrate Joule into SAP Analytics Cloud and further evolve the analytical capabilities of Joule.

With the above release, we call your attention to the following services, released and plan to release to support our SAP Customers and an opportunity for Partners to do more with GenAI.

2.2 Joule Architecture

Joule provides an embedded co-pilot experience across solution areas, consistent and with memory of interactions across multiple products.

The users start with their queries in the natively integrated Joule client embedded in our respective SAP cloud applications:

Each incoming request is processed and orchestrated based on what is available.

Joule considers 3 categories:

  1. Joule analyzes if the user-prompt is relevant for Joule’s Scenario Catalog. This catalog contains metadata of all available scenarios, functions, and skills of SAP cloud applications.
  2. Joule conducts an informational filtering based on the Knowledge Catalog. This contains SAP knowledge as well as customer-owned knowledge. This process is based on Retrieval Augmented Generation for enterprise (RAGe) and lets the LLM generate an answer based and grounded on the dedicated text that was previously retrieved.
  3. Joule is aware of the user’s context and history. This includes information about which SAP cloud application the respective user is using and which additional SAP application the customer has licensed and has Joule activated. Also, Joule is aware of the user's role(s) and permissions. This means a user cannot access information or adjust business processes they couldn’t do directly in the SAP cloud application without using Joule. At last, Joule understands a user’s chat history and context, ensuring the best possible answers in the context of questions asked shortly before.

Joule takes all this contextual information and provides a much richer query to the LLM which is responsible for the dialog management. This LLM is based on a rich ecosystem of technology partner LLM offerings also available directly via SAP Business Technology Platform’s AI Foundation and the SAP Generative AI Hub. Here we are leveraging the latest LLMs and innovations available in the market under strict contractual agreements with SAP’s partners which prohibit them from training any of their AI-models on any customer data.

Next, the LLM provides a grounded response back to the Joule service or identifies the need to leverage Joule functions which includes the Joule scenarios of our SAP Cloud Applications.

  • In this case, Joule calls the respective SAP backend system to proceed with the requested query, e.g. requesting time off.
  • The response is then filtered as appropriate, and the customer gets a response knowing the conversation and output has been processed all with enterprise security, data privacy, and responsible AI considered.

2.3 Joule Services

  • SAP Document Grounding (Policy Documents) - We offer SAP Document Grounding (RAG) capability out of the box which helps Joule to comprehend content from PDF and MS Word documents. With this support, you can upload any document related to policies and processes in your SharePoint. This setup is going to be common to your SAP products. 
  • Joule for Consultants – SAP Business AI in Consulting Capability for Joule enables Joule users to tap into SAP Content like SAP Learning, SAP Help, SAP Community, and developer tutorials content. The solution empowers you to receive fast and detailed answers to questions concerning the design, implementation, or update of SAP systems - across the SAP product portfolio. You can quickly watch the demo here.
  • Joule for Developers (SAP Build Code) – SAP Build Code, generative AI-based code development with Joule copilot, optimized for Java and JavaScript application development, providing a turn-key environment for coding, testing, integrations, and application lifecycle management. You can find more details here.
  • Joule Extensibility – Gives our Customers and Partners an option to build on top of SAP standard support that we offer for Joule, planned release Q1, 2025.
  • Joule with SAP Business Technology Platform – For all your SAP BTP Admin tasks we introduce Joule in your SAP BTP Cockpit, planned Release Q4, 2024.
  • Joule + Microsoft Copilot – This is one of the amazing features of integration with Joule - SAP Business Data and Microsoft services. You can watch the demo to understand more here.

You can also find our release plan here:

2.3 Joule Pricing

With a wide variety of integrations and support offered by Joule, the important question is how I get Joule and how is it going to be charged. As a customer, you need to opt for a Joule Embedded License, an entitlement that will be added to your SAP Business Technology Platform - global account. SAP offers free and fair usage of messages based on your existing license for every LOB where Joule is supported. As an example, SAP SuccessFactors offers free messages as follows:

 

SFSF UserMessages/year
1-5,000240,000
5,001-25,0001,20,000
25,001-75,0006,000,000
>75,0009,600,000

Similar messages are added to your Joule consumption (based on your product licenses that support Joule integration). If you are using any of the GenAI services or exceeding your Joule message allocations, it will consume the SAP AI Units. For further details, you can refer to the SAP AI Service list and AI Terms.

With this, we understand the questions on prerequisites and the setup in BTP that you may have as a customer or if you are a partner helping customers make the decisions. We take this topic of Unified Joule or One Joule to our next blog to address some of the common questions, please continue reading here.

 

For additional information on SAP Joule, and how to activate the services you may look at the SAP Learning Journey.

This release will allow all our SAP SuccessFactors customers to use Joule irrespective of the SAP SuccessFactors Data Center and pick any/nearest data center where Joule is supported. You can find more updates here: SAP Note: 3519499 and What’s new with Joule.

3. SAP Business AI Services in SAP BTP

This offering is best suited while you have the use cases that you would like to achieve. The AI Services offered on the SAP Business Technology Platform give you options to integrate, Automate, and make use of the most Generative AI capabilities. These options are possible using the SAP AI Core and AI Launchpad services.

The image below can help to add more details on the GenAI Capabilities:

For further details, I recommend the blogs below:

  • How SAP's Generative AI Architecture Redefines Business Applications
  • How SAP’s Generative AI Hub facilitates embedded, trustworthy, and reliable AI
  • Generative AI – Roadmap
  • Tutorials - Prompt LLMs in the generative AI hub in SAP AI Core & Launchpad

SAP also offers the following Business AI services, Document Information Extraction, Data Attribute Extraction, Data Attribute Recommendation, Personalized Recommendation, etc...

SAP also has AI Developer services such as SAP Build Code,  SAP ABAP capabilities (planned release), and SAP iFlow (integration flow) using GenAI.

Most of the details are available on SAP Discovery Center and some of these services are available as SAP BTP Try & Buy.

For a quick check on Generative AI Models Availability here - 3437766

Stay tuned for more updates from SAP on – Joule Extensibility Capabilities, Joule for Consultants, AI Agents, Orchestration Workflow, and more.

Quick reference can be to SAP TechEd 2024, which can help with the planned releases:

 

 

Consuming the AI Services for your Business usage

As a customer, you would be looking for information on how to consume these services. As mentioned, above these services require respective licenses:

For Embedded AI capabilities - delivered out of the box by SAP as a customer you will need AI Units and may require you to activate a check box flag to start using the services. Example, 

  • SAP SFSF 
    • Job Description Enhancement Using AI
    • Premium AI Features in SAP SuccessFactors
  • SAP Sales Cloud Version 2
  • SAP Business Networks

On the other hand, Joule and AI Services on BTP are available in a few data centers across the globe, however, they can be cross-consumed. For BTP AI services you can always refer to SAP Discovery Center – AI Solutions and Joule data center list.

Note: SAP is working on expanding the data center support on these topics, however, we do not have defined timelines. In case you plan to activate the AI services today, with available data centers, please keep in mind you may have to migrate/reactivate with new data centers, in case you would like to choose the nearest location.

With this in context, I would like to talk about factors to consider during cross-consumption of the applications:

  • DC availability
  • Latency across DCs with your SAP Cloud Applications and your SAP AI Services
  • Country / Regional Laws
  • Customer Data preference (e.g. EU Access)

To discuss the above topics, we can take examples with a few scenarios.

Scenario 1

The customer has a single SAP product with a data center in his country and has an AI data center available in his country. In this case, the customer can choose the supported data center in his country and activate the required service.


Scenario 2

The customer has a single SAP product with a data center in his country but has no AI data center available in his country. In this case, the customer can choose the nearest AI data center and activate the service.


Scenario 3

The customer has multiple SAP products that are in the same country and has an AI data center available in his country. In this case, the customer can choose the AI data center in his country which could be nearest to all SAP products that are licensed.


Scenario 4

The customer has multiple SAP products that are in different locations and has no AI data center available in his country. In this case, the customer can choose the nearest AI data center available and activate the services.

Let me put this with a few examples, your scenarios can be based on your different systems at different locations. To help you choose your AI data center, I can take a few cases with Joule.

Case 1: You plan to integrate a single Joule application with SAP SuccessFactors, SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, SAP Integrated Business Planning, and SAP Product Lifecycle Management that are in different data centers, you can choose the region for Joule that is close to all the application datacenters.

 

Case 2:  You plan the Joule integration with SAP SuccessFactors, SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud, SAP Integrated Business Planning, and SAP Product Lifecycle Management with different data centers in different regions, you can prioritize the SAP Systems where there are maximum business users, and you can choose the appropriate SAP BTP Subaccount.

Based on your priority of SAP SFSF - Virginia and S/4 HANA – Toronto and IBP and PLM in the Europe region, you can decide to set up a BTP Subaccount in US10 – Virginia.

Latency

Some examples are based on global ping statistics, which may vary over time and can help you with an indication to pick the right subaccount for cross-consumption.

Note: This is not an SAP official statement, you may use this for reference only.

I hope this gives you a preview of how you can plan your activations for all LOBs to ensure you have the maximum benefits from SAP AI Services.

If you have any further questions on the SAP AI Services, you can refer to the official help page or reach us at SAP_AI_RIG@sap.com.

Regards,

Nagesh Caparthy

entry.title: Phemex Einladungscode: HMXFT5 (Anmeldebonus 2024 anfordern)
entry.content:
Wenn Sie nach einem Phemex Einladungscode suchen, ist Ihre Suche hier zu Ende. Registrieren Sie sich bei Phemex.com mit dem Einladungscode HMXFT5, um einen großzügigen Handelsaktionsbonus von 8.800 USD zu erhalten und 50 % Rabatt auf die Phemex-Handelsgebühren zu erhalten.

 

Phemex EinladungscodeHMXFT5 – Registriere dich bei Phemex.com, um einen $8.800 Bonus und 50% Rabatt auf Handelsgebühren zu erhalten.
Wie man den Code eingibtGib den Code HMXFT5 bei der Registrierung im Feld "Einladungscode" ein, um die Belohnung zu aktivieren.
Vorteile des EinladungscodesErhalte $8.800 und 5100 Phemex Token, die für den Handel, Staking und Rabatte auf Gebühren verwendet werden können.
Jahr2024

 

Was ist der Phemex Einladungscode?

Der Phemex Einladungscode 2024 lautet HMXFT5. Neue Benutzer, die sich bei Phemex.com anmelden, können diesen Code verwenden, der für den Spothandel mit Kryptowährungen, Derivaten und Altcoins gilt. Dieser Code ist verifiziert und heute in Ihrer Region verfügbar.

Vorteil des Phemex-Einladungscodes "HMXFT5"

Der Phemex Anmeldebonus bietet eine verlockende Gelegenheit für Neueinsteiger und bietet ein umfassendes Leistungspaket:

Bonusdetails: Nach erfolgreicher Registrierung und Anwendung des Einladungscodes erhalten Benutzer einen Anmeldebonus in Höhe von 8.800 USD und 5100 Phemex-Token.
Vorteile maximieren: Der 8.800-Dollar-Anteil des Bonus kann zur Deckung von Handelsgebühren oder zum Ausgleich von Verlusten auf Spot- und Futures-Märkten verwendet werden, was besonders für Anfänger im Handel von Vorteil ist.
Darüber hinaus bieten die 5100 Phemex-Token verschiedene Vorteile, darunter Staking-Möglichkeiten, vePT-Einnahmen, Rabatte auf Handelsgebühren und andere Vergünstigungen, die das allgemeine Handelserlebnis auf Phemex verbessern.

Phemex-Anmeldebonus

Der Einstieg mit dem Phemex Einladungscode ist einfach. Hier ist eine Schritt-für-Schritt-Anleitung zur Vorgehensweise:

1. Besuchen Sie die Phemex-Website oder -App

Gehen Sie zu https://phemex.com oder installieren Sie die Phemex-App auf Ihrem iOS- oder Android-Gerät. Stellen Sie sicher, dass Sie die App von vertrauenswürdigen Quellen wie dem Google Play Store oder dem Apple App Store herunterladen, um Betrug oder Hacks zu vermeiden.

2. Erstellen Sie ein Phemex-Konto

Wenn Sie die Weboberfläche verwenden, klicken Sie oben links auf die Schaltfläche „Jetzt registrieren“. Tippen Sie für mobile Benutzer auf die Schaltfläche „Konto erstellen“. Daraufhin wird ein Anmeldeformular angezeigt, in das Sie Ihre E-Mail-Adresse und Ihr Passwort eingeben müssen.

3. Geben Sie den Phemex-Einladungscode (Phemex Einladungscode) ein

Wählen Sie im Anmeldeformular "Einladungscode (optional)" aus, um ein neues Textfeld anzuzeigen.

Geben Sie den Phemex-Einladungscode HMXFT5 in das Textfeld ein.

Klicken Sie auf "Konto erstellen", um den Anmeldevorgang abzuschließen und Ihren Anmeldebonus von bis zu 8.800 USD zu erhalten.

Indem Sie diese einfachen Schritte befolgen, können Sie problemlos auf die Vorteile des Phemex-Einladungscodes zugreifen und Ihre Handelserfahrung auf Phemex mit zusätzlichen Mitteln auf Ihrem Konto verbessern.

Häufig gestellte Fragen zum Phemex-Einladungscode

Wie zuverlässig ist Phemex?

Im Allgemeinen gilt Phemex als seriöse und benutzerfreundliche Börse mit vielversprechenden Aussichten innerhalb des aufstrebenden Web3-Ökosystems. Sie bietet Optionen für Kauf, Verkauf, Spot- und Vertragshandel und zeichnet sich gleichzeitig durch innovative Funktionen wie Prognosemärkte und ein hybrides "halbzentralisiertes" Modell aus.

Wie lautet der Code für Phemex?

Um den Phemex-Promocode-Bonus zu erhalten, müssen Benutzer während der Kontoerstellung den Phemex-Bonuscode HMXFT5 eingeben.

Wie lautet der Einladungscode?

Der Phemex-Einladungscode für 2024 lautet HMXFT5. Alle neuen Benutzer werden ermutigt, diesen Promocode zu verwenden.

Wie lautet der Anmeldecode für Phemex?

Um den Phemex-Promocode-Bonus zu erhalten, müssen Benutzer während der Kontoerstellung den Phemex-Bonuscode HMXFT5 eingeben. Sobald das Konto erstellt ist, kann der Bonuscode nicht mehr angewendet werden.

entry.title: Code d'invitation Phemex : HMXFT5 (réclamez le bonus d'inscription 2024)
entry.content:
Si vous recherchez un code d'invitation Phemex, votre recherche s'arrête ici. Inscrivez-vous sur Phemex.com avec le code d'invitation HMXFT5 pour réclamer un généreux bonus de promotion de trading de 8 800 $ et recevoir une remise de 50 % sur les frais de trading Phemex.

 

Code d'invitation PhemexHMXFT5
Comment entrer le codeLors de l'inscription, entrez le code HMXFT5 dans la section "Code d'invitation" pour activer la récompense.
Avantages du code d'invitationRecevez 8 800 $ et 5100 tokens Phemex pour trader, staking, et réduction des frais.
Année2024

Qu'est-ce que le code d'invitation Phemex ?

Le code d'invitation Phemex 2024 est HMXFT5. Les nouveaux utilisateurs qui s'inscrivent sur Phemex.com peuvent utiliser ce code, applicable au trading au comptant de crypto-monnaies, aux produits dérivés et aux altcoins. Ce code est vérifié et opérationnel aujourd'hui, disponible dans votre région.

Avantage du code d'invitation Phemex HMXFT5

Le bonus d'inscription Phemex offre une opportunité attrayante aux nouveaux arrivants, en leur offrant un ensemble complet d'avantages :

Détails du bonus : après une inscription réussie et l'application du code d'invitation, les utilisateurs reçoivent un bonus d'inscription composé de 8 800 $ et de 5 100 jetons Phemex.
Maximisation des avantages : la partie de 8 800 $ du bonus peut être utilisée pour couvrir les frais de négociation ou compenser les pertes sur les marchés au comptant et à terme, ce qui est particulièrement avantageux pour les débutants en trading.
De plus, les 5 100 jetons Phemex offrent divers avantages, notamment des opportunités de jalonnement, des gains vePT, des remises sur les frais de négociation et d'autres avantages qui améliorent l'expérience de trading globale sur Phemex.

Bonus d'inscription Phemex

Il est facile de commencer avec le code d'invitation Phemex. Voici un guide étape par étape sur la façon de procéder :

1. Visitez le site Web ou l'application Phemex

Accédez à https://phemex.com ou installez l'application Phemex sur votre appareil iOS ou Android. Assurez-vous de télécharger l'application à partir de sources fiables telles que Google Play Store ou Apple App Store pour éviter les escroqueries ou les piratages.

2. Créez un compte Phemex

Si vous utilisez l'interface Web, cliquez sur le bouton « S'inscrire maintenant » situé en haut à gauche. Pour les utilisateurs mobiles, appuyez sur le bouton « Créer un compte ». Cela fera apparaître un formulaire d'inscription dans lequel vous devrez saisir votre e-mail et votre mot de passe.

3. Saisissez le code d'invitation Phemex (code d'invitation Phemex)

Sur le formulaire d'inscription, sélectionnez « Code d'invitation (facultatif) » pour révéler un nouveau champ de texte.
Saisissez le code d'invitation Phemex HMXFT5 dans le champ de texte.
Cliquez sur « Créer un compte » pour terminer le processus d'inscription et recevoir votre bonus d'inscription pouvant atteindre 8 800 $.

En suivant ces étapes simples, vous pouvez facilement accéder aux avantages du code d'invitation Phemex, en donnant un coup de pouce à votre parcours de trading sur Phemex avec des fonds supplémentaires sur votre compte.

FAQ sur le code d'invitation Phemex

Quelle est la fiabilité de Phemex ?

En général, Phemex est considéré comme une bourse réputée et conviviale avec des perspectives prometteuses au sein de l'écosystème émergent du Web3. Il offre des options d'achat, de vente, de trading au comptant et de contrats, tout en se démarquant par des fonctionnalités innovantes telles que les marchés de prédiction et un modèle hybride « semi-centralisé ».

Quel est le code pour Phemex ?

Pour réclamer le bonus du code promotionnel Phemex, les utilisateurs doivent saisir le code bonus Phemex HMXFT5 lors du processus de création de compte.

Quel est le code d'invitation ?

Le code d'invitation Phemex pour 2024 est HMXFT5. Tous les nouveaux utilisateurs sont encouragés à utiliser ce code promotionnel.

Quel est le code d'inscription pour Phemex ?

Pour bénéficier du code promo Phemex, les utilisateurs doivent saisir le code bonus Phemex HMXFT5 lors du processus de création du compte. Une fois le compte créé, le code bonus ne peut plus être appliqué.

entry.title: Phemex Davet Kodu: HMXFT5 (Kayıt Bonusu 2024'ü Talep Edin)
entry.content:
Bir Phemex Davet kodu arıyorsanız, aramanız burada sona eriyor. Cömert bir 8.800$ ticaret promosyon bonusu talep etmek ve Phemex ticaret ücretlerinde %50 indirim almak için HMXFT5 davet koduyla Phemex.com'a kaydolun.

Phemex Davet KoduHMXFT5 – Phemex.com'a kaydolun ve $8,800 bonus ile %50 işlem ücreti indirimi kazanın.
Kod nasıl girilir?Kayıt olurken, ödülü etkinleştirmek için HMXFT5 kodunu "Davet Kodu" kısmına girin.
Kayıt rehberiKaydolurken HMXFT5 kodunu girerek bonusunuzu alın.
Yıl2024

Phemex Davet Kodu Nedir?

2024 Phemex Davetiye Kodu HMXFT5'tir. Phemex.com'a kaydolan yeni kullanıcılar, kripto para spot ticareti, türevler ve altcoinler için geçerli olan bu kodu kullanabilir. Bu kod doğrulanmış ve bugün çalışır durumdadır, bölgenizde mevcuttur.

Phemex Davetiye Kodu “HMXFT5” Avantajı

Phemex Kayıt Bonusu, yeni başlayanlar için cazip bir fırsat sunarak kapsamlı bir avantaj paketi sunar:

Bonus Ayrıntıları: Davetiye kodunun başarılı bir şekilde kaydedilmesi ve uygulanması üzerine, kullanıcılar 8.800$ ve 5100 Phemex Token'dan oluşan bir kayıt bonusu alırlar.
Faydaları Maksimize Etme: Bonusun 8.800$'lık kısmı, özellikle ticarette yeni başlayanlar için faydalı olan hem spot hem de vadeli işlem piyasalarındaki işlem ücretlerini karşılamak veya kayıpları telafi etmek için kullanılabilir.
Ek olarak, 5100 Phemex Token'ı, staking fırsatları, vePT kazançları, işlem ücretlerinde indirimler ve Phemex'teki genel işlem deneyimini geliştiren diğer avantajlar dahil olmak üzere çeşitli avantajlar sunar.

Phemex Kayıt Bonusu

Phemex Davetiye Kodu ile başlamak kolaydır. İşte nasıl ilerleyeceğinize dair adım adım bir kılavuz:

1. Phemex Web Sitesini veya Uygulamasını ziyaret edin

https://phemex.com adresine gidin veya Phemex uygulamasını iOS veya Android cihazınıza yükleyin. Dolandırıcılıklardan veya saldırılardan kaçınmak için uygulamayı Google Play Store veya Apple App Store gibi güvenilir kaynaklardan indirdiğinizden emin olun.

2. Bir Phemex Hesabı Oluşturun

Web arayüzünü kullanıyorsanız, sol üstte bulunan "Şimdi Kaydol" düğmesine tıklayın. Mobil kullanıcılar için "Hesap oluştur" düğmesine dokunun. Bu, e-postanızı ve şifrenizi girmeniz gereken bir kayıt formu getirecektir.

3. Phemex Davet Kodunu (Phemex Davet Kodu) girin

Kayıt formunda, yeni bir metin alanı ortaya çıkarmak için "Davet Kodu (İsteğe Bağlı)" öğesini seçin.
Metin alanına Phemex Davet Kodu HMXFT5'i girin. Kayıt işlemini tamamlamak ve 8.800$'a kadar kayıt bonusunuzu almak için "Hesap Oluştur"a tıklayın.

Bu basit adımları izleyerek, Phemex Davet Kodunun avantajlarına kolayca erişebilir ve hesabınızdaki ek fonlarla Phemex'teki işlem yolculuğunuza ivme kazandırabilirsiniz.

Phemex Davet Kodu SSS

Phemex ne kadar güvenilir?

Genel olarak, Phemex, ortaya çıkan web3 ekosisteminde umut vadeden potansiyellere sahip saygın ve kullanıcı dostu bir borsa olarak kabul edilir. Tahmin piyasaları ve hibrit "Yarı Merkezi" model gibi yenilikçi özellikleriyle öne çıkarken, satın alma, satış, spot ve sözleşme ticareti için seçenekler sunar.

Phemex için kod nedir?

Phemex Promosyon Kodu Bonusunu talep etmek için kullanıcıların hesap oluşturma işlemi sırasında Phemex bonus kodu HMXFT5'i girmeleri gerekir.

Davet kodu nedir?

2024 yılı için Phemex Davet kodu HMXFT5'tir. Tüm yeni kullanıcıların bu promosyon kodunu kullanmaları teşvik edilmektedir.

Phemex için kayıt kodu nedir?

entry.title: Issues with Quick Confirm in Perform Maintenance Jobs
entry.content:
Hi,

First post so sorry if I post in wrong place.

We have migrated maintenance plans into SAP. Each maintenance plan have an Item with Task List. All Task List have operations with estimated work in hours and amount of personal needed.

If we try to do Quick Confirm in Perform Maintenance Jobs and we are not assigned to the Order/Operation, the page never stops loading. It would be nice with some error message.

A bigger issue is that in most cases when we are assigned to the Order and Operation and press Quick Confirm, we in the first step get message "Remaining Effort=NaN HR".
In next step we get "Property ActualWorkEffort at offset 181 has invalid value NaN".
Can someone guide me what to look for?

To open each operation in Perform Maintenance Job, press Start and confirm Work Done from there is not an option.

Thanks in advance!

Regards, Anders

entry.title: SSO Usage in the SAP Business ByDesign Mobile
entry.content:
You would like to know if the SSO is supported in the SAP Business ByDesign Mobile.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SSO Usage in the SAP Business ByDesign Mobile
entry.content:
Currently, this is the expected system behavior.

You can download the app in your work profile if your company allows it. However, Single Sign-On (SSO) won't function within your work profile or even if you download the app in your personal space.

Additionally, the app utilizes the Cordova plugin in-app browser, which means it cannot be opened with other browsers.

 

If you wish to access it via a browser, we have a 'mobilclient.html' URL available, which is:

https://myXXXXXXXX.sapbydesign.com/sap/public/ap/ui/repository/SAP_UI/HTMLOBERON5/mobileClient.html

Please change the XXXXXX to the Tenant URL accordingly.

entry.title: How to create a curriculum with item A and following item B with retraining?
entry.content:
Hello,
we need to implement the following scenario with a curriculum:

An employee must complete Item A within 365 days of the assignment date. The employee should then automatically be assigned item B. The employee must then complete Element B every two years.

For Item B, we have already stated that Item A is a prerequisite for Item B.

But how can I display the automatic assignment of items with dependencies in a curriculum?

Do you have any ideas?

Regards

Guido

entry.title: Phemex Referral Code: J6JLA5 (How to get Phemex bonus?)
entry.content:
Getting started with the Phemex Referral Code is easy. Here's a step-by-step guide on how to proceed: Visit Phemex Website or App Go to https://phemex.com or install the Phemex app on your iOS or Android device. Make sure to download the app from trusted sources like the Google Play Store or Apple App Store to avoid scams or hacks. Create a Phemex Account If you're using the web interface, click on the "Register Now" button located at the top left. For mobile users, tap on the "Create an account" button. This will bring up a sign-up form where you'll need to enter your email and password. Enter the Phemex Referral Code On the sign-up form, select "Referral Code (Optional)" to reveal a new text field. Enter the Phemex Referral Code J6JLA5 into the text field. Click on "Create Account" to complete the sign-up process and receive your sign-up bonus of up to $8,800. By following these simple steps, you can easily access the benefits of the Phemex Referral Code and Phemex Earn, giving y
